patch_description: Propose consolidating the pre- and post-entanglement RZ parameter keys into shared per-quadrant keys (rz_corner, rz_edge, rz_center). This reduces the number of unique parameters per block from 11 to 8 by reusing the same keys across both the pre- and post-entanglement RZ layers, while preserving the symmetry-based sharing strategy. This should improve parameter efficiency, potentially improving generalization and allowing the Adam optimizer to converge with fewer degrees of freedom.
